name: Blocky Zombie Shooting
description: Blocky Zombie Shooting drops you into a voxel warzone where waves of undead swarm every lane. Grab quirky guns, craft quick barricades, and kite hordes through tight corners to survive. Web Dev https://www.bestcrazygames.com/ Upgrade ammo, unlock skins, and chase headshot combos in arcade or survival modes. Fast runs, crunchy sound, and satisfying ragdolls make each round dangerously replayable. Aim sharp, reload faster.
instructions: wasd - to walk and drive mouse - look around aim shootin
